text: My daughter is 8 and we got one. She likes a few of the games but would I buy it again…no. She hasn’t played with it as much as I thought she would. I feel like younger kids definitely would like it a little better.
text_zh: 我女儿 8 岁，我们买了一个。她喜欢其中几个游戏，但我会再买一次吗……不。她没有像我想象的那样常玩。我觉得年龄小点的孩子肯定会更喜欢。

text: I got it and my daughter hasn’t stopped playing it and I haven’t even bought the subscription yet. She’s 5 I plan on getting the subscription for Christmas
text_zh: 我买了我女儿就没停下来玩，我都还没买会员呢。她 5 岁，我打算圣诞节给她买会员

text: Yes! Sooo worth it, and it has dancing/fitness programming for grown ups to enjoy. Games are added monthly to the subscription. Go get one!!!
text_zh: 没错！太值了，而且还有适合大人的跳舞/健身节目。游戏每个月都会更新到订阅里。赶紧去买一个！！！

text: We got it for Christmas with the subscription. My kids are 6 and 3. They love it. There’s arcade style games like hungry hippo, whack a mole, then there are games like bluey, Barbie, Gabby’s Dollhouse, Sesame Street. The. There are more active games.
text_zh: 圣诞节收到的，带了订阅。我孩子6岁和3岁。他们很喜欢。有街机游戏，比如饥饿的河马、打地鼠，还有像 Bluey、Barbie、Gabby’s Dollhouse、芝麻街这样的游戏。然后还有一些更活跃的游戏。

text: I have a 3y and 6y boys and they are always playing it. my husband and I get in on some games and its nonstop laughing! sooooo many games!
text_zh: 我有 3 岁和 6 岁的儿子，他们一直在玩。我老公和我也会加入玩一些游戏，笑声不断！有超多游戏！

text: Yes, got my kid ,3yo, one for Christmas. It’s a multitude of games for that $80. she plays bluey, Pepa pig, and a lot of preschool games. I can box there Zumba basketball a lot of stuff for tha 1 payment fr. I pay $60+ for 1 PlayStation game.
text_zh: 是的，我圣诞节给我 3 岁的孩子买了一个。80 美元有很多游戏。她玩 Bluey、Pepa pig 和很多学前游戏。我一次付费就可以玩 Zumba 篮球之类的很多东西。我买一个 PlayStation 游戏就要花 60 多美元。

text: Yesss!!! I bought it for my granddaughter to help keep her active all winter long while we're stuck inside and she plays it nonstop and you could subscribe & get extra games as well. It's definitely worth it.!
text_zh: 是的！！！我给我孙女买的，为了在我们整个冬天都困在家里的时候能让她保持活跃，她玩得没完没了，而且你还可以订阅获得额外的游戏。绝对值得！

text: I just need someone to compare it to Xbox Kinect. The videos I’ve seen seems to be a delay in your actions and the game.
text_zh: 我只是需要有人把它和Xbox Kinect比较一下。我看到的视频似乎你的动作和游戏之间有延迟。

text: I have a 4 and 10 yo. They both love it. I also enjoy the dancing games. We’ve played it everyday since Xmas. Do suggest getting the yearly subscription for the best deal. Cons: limited games, could be a little better for what it is.
text_zh: 我有一个4岁的和一个10岁的。他们都喜欢。我也喜欢跳舞游戏。自从圣诞节以来，我们每天都在玩。建议买年会员划算。缺点：游戏有限，考虑到它的价值，还可以更好一点。

text: We like it. She’s used it for about an hour each day since Christmas.
text_zh: 我们喜欢。自从圣诞节以来，她每天都玩大概一个小时。

text: My 10 8 5 year old have been playing for it non stop since Christmas , me and my husband also play , I think it’s like a newer Wii lol 🤣 I think it’s worth it .
text_zh: 我10岁、8岁、5岁的孩子从圣诞节开始就一直在玩，我和我老公也玩，我觉得这有点像新款Wii lol🤣我觉得值。

text: 100%. My 6 year old loves to play bowling. She also loves the Bluey game, too. There’s also workout games for us mamas because let’s be honest, that’s what sealed the deal for me to get it.
text_zh: 100%。我6岁的女儿超爱玩保龄球。她也很喜欢Bluey游戏。还有给我们这些妈妈的健身游戏，说实话，这才是让我下定决心买下来的原因。

text: We bought it and it’s so worth it
text_zh: 我们买了，非常值！

text: I haven’t gotten it yet but I ordered it on Black Friday for my son. They convinced me lol, they add 2 new games every month and I haven’t seen any bad review yet!
text_zh: 我还没拿到，但我在黑色星期五给儿子订了。他们说服我了 lol，他们每个月都会加2个新游戏，而且我还没看到任何差评！

text: I bought it. And it’s amazing ❤️
text_zh: 我买了。太棒了 ❤️

text: Yes, wonderful family game time!
text_zh: 是啊，超棒的家庭游戏时光！

text: I got it. My son and daughter love it. And I do Zumba on it.
text_zh: 我买了。我儿子女儿都很喜欢。我也用它来跳尊巴。

text: Yes i love it, its so worth it
text_zh: 是的，我喜欢它，物超所值

text: My kids are 9 and 14. They played for a couple of weeks and now rarely touch it.
text_zh: 我的孩子们9岁和14岁。他们玩了几个星期，现在很少碰它了。

text: I bought it last year and it’s 100% worth it. There’s plenty of games and they come out with new ones almost every month! Even my childcare kids love it
text_zh: 我去年买的，100% 值。游戏很多，而且几乎每个月都会出新的！连我托儿所的孩子们都喜欢

text: Yes!!! It was a combined gift for our kids—- we love it!
text_zh: 没错！！！这是送给孩子们的合买礼物——我们超爱！

text: Sis I’ll let u know in a few days I comes tomorrow
text_zh: 姐妹，几天后告诉你，我明天到货

text: We loved it but our son is now 9 and he’s to old now
text_zh: 我们挺喜欢的，但我们儿子现在9岁了，他觉得太老了，玩不了了

text: I bought it for my son last year and he loves it, they are always adding new games.
text_zh: 我去年给我儿子买了一个，他超喜欢，而且他们总是在更新新游戏。

text: 4 year old and yes it’s great
text_zh: 4岁了，是的，很棒

text: My 5 year old and 7 year old love it! 40+ games right now.
text_zh: 我5岁和7岁的孩子超喜欢！现在有40多个游戏。

text: We opened it on Christmas and we loveeeee it!! I’ll be up playing in the morning before my 4 year old lol
text_zh: 圣诞节拆开的，我们爱死它了！！我早上会比我四岁的孩子起得还早玩 lol

text: GET IT. And let’s be real one video game now cost 75$ and that’s only one game you pay 100$ for a whole year of them adding new games it’s usually 2 games added a month plus updates to games already on the system I even play it as a 35yr old and it has exercise apps
text_zh: 赶紧买！说实在的，现在一个游戏就75美元，而且才一个游戏，你花100美元就能玩一整年的游戏，他们还不断更新游戏，通常每个月加2个新游戏，还有对现有游戏的更新。我35岁了都还在玩，还有健身App呢

text: I’m wondering the same!!! I’m on edge about it!
text_zh: 我也在想这个！！！我心痒痒的！

text: I thought you was talking about an outside playground 🙈🤣😂🤣😂
text_zh: 我还以为你说的是外面的游乐场呢 🙈🤣😂🤣😂

text: 1000% I bought it for my grandkids and sometimes they want to come over just to play it. They love it so much that I bought one for each of their houses for Christmas. It comes with five free games, but the $89 a year is totally worth it too.
text_zh: 1000% 我给我孙子孙女们买的，有时候他们就想过来玩。他们太喜欢了，我圣诞节给他们每人又买了一个放家里。自带五个免费游戏，但每年 89 美元也值了。

text: yeah the yearly thing got me thinking..like are they good games? I need to know too
text_zh: 对，年度订阅让我犹豫了……他们游戏好玩吗？我也想知道

text: yes it's worth it every kid every age can play
text_zh: 是的，值得买，每个孩子每个年龄段都能玩

text: 100% worth it. My 4 and 8 yr old sons love it. Heck, I even play it. The annual subscription is definitely worth the upgrade too and it seems they update the games frequently to fit the season
text_zh: 100%值。我4岁和8岁的儿子很喜欢。甚至我自己也玩。年费订阅也绝对值得升级，而且他们似乎会经常更新游戏来适应季节。

text: Yes! 6 yr old twins and they absolutely LOVE IT! got a 2nd one for the older kids!
text_zh: 太棒了！6岁的双胞胎超爱它！给大点的孩子又买了一个！

text: Someone had a good point… on other devices you have to buy individual games
text_zh: 有人说得对……在其他设备上，你得单独买游戏

text: target.. Go try it out I loved it 😁 fruit ninja our favorite. it has 5 games on it but I ain't buying no sub just yet.
text_zh: Target... 去试试，我太喜欢了 😁 水果忍者是我们的最爱。它上面有 5 个游戏，但我还没打算买订阅。

text: I needed this video!
text_zh: 我需要这个视频！

text: I got it my 5 yr old loves it! And he is tired afterwards. I was hesitant about the subscription too, but we have the switch & VR, & games are so expensive that they rarely play them. This way all of their games are included & no in game purchases. It's especially nice because it's been so cold here, so it gets so energy out. There's lots of good family games, & some are 2-6 players too.
text_zh: 我买了一个，我 5 岁的儿子很喜欢！而且玩完之后他就累了。我之前还在犹豫订阅费的事，但我们有 Switch 和 VR，而且游戏都太贵了，他们很少玩。这样的话，他们的所有游戏都包含在内，而且没有游戏内购买。这特别棒，因为这里一直很冷，所以能让他消耗不少精力。有很多不错的家庭游戏，还有些支持 2-6 人玩。

text: Yes it is! My sons are 3 and 6 and it’s 100% worth it. It has like 80 games in the pass. I did post a video here of my son playing it because why not try to make a dollar off of it because I have it but I 100% bought it and they love it
text_zh: 是的！我儿子3岁和6岁，它绝对值这个价。它里面有大概80个游戏。我在这里发了个我儿子玩它的视频，因为反正我有，为什么不试试赚点钱呢，他们特别喜欢

text: 💯 It’s awesome has so many games and different age ranges
text_zh: 💯 太棒了，它有很多游戏，适合不同年龄段

text: Yes! Great for adults too! They update it with new games just about every month.
text_zh: 没错！大人也超适合！他们几乎每个月都会更新新游戏。

text: It is the best thing we've ever bought our grandkids. It auto downloads all the new games. They play it all the time. The yearly fee is a good price
text_zh: 这是我们给孙子孙女买过的最好的东西。它会自动下载所有新游戏。他们一直在玩。年费很划算

text: what $90 a year. I didnt know that. I am think of getting that too
text_zh: 什么一年90美元。我不知道这个。我也考虑入手。

text: The subscription is cheap for all the games when you think about the fact that any other game system, Nintendo, PlayStation x box, etc you gotta pay 50-90$ PER game.
text_zh: 你想想，其他游戏机，任天堂、PlayStation、Xbox之类的，每个游戏都要50-90美元，相对来说这个订阅还是很划算的，包含这么多游戏。

text: Yes it is !!I love it
text_zh: 是的！！我爱了

text: I sure hope so. because I bought it as a joint gift for my kiddos for Christmas.
text_zh: 我真希望是这样，因为我把它作为给孩子们一起的圣诞礼物买的。

text: Yes! It’s cheaper on TikTok shop! There are A LOT of games! My son is 5 and he plays it EVERY day! My other son is 2.5 he thinks he plays and loves it. We bowled as a family Saturday. We love it!
text_zh: 对！TikTok 店里更便宜！游戏巨多！我儿子 5 岁，每天都玩！我小儿子 2.5 岁，他以为自己在玩，可喜欢了。我们周六全家一起打保龄球。我们爱死它了！

text: My adult boys also like playing on it with the littles. There are games and fun filter activities that my kids really enjoy.
text_zh: 我大儿子们和孩子们一起玩也很喜欢。里面有我孩子们喜欢的游戏和有趣的滤镜活动。

text: Yes get it!!!!!! My daughter and I love it
text_zh: 是的是的，快买！我女儿和我爱死了

text: Yes! We bought the play pass for the additional games. I’ll be honest it doesn’t come with a lot of games, but enough for us to stay active, entertained and have fun.
text_zh: 是的！我们买了Play Pass来玩额外的游戏。说实话，游戏不算特别多，但足够让我们保持活力，开心，玩得尽兴。

text: My grandkids are 5 and 7 and LOVE it. Being so cold outside I like they are active.
text_zh: 我的孙子孙女5岁和7岁，非常喜欢。外面这么冷，我喜欢他们这样活跃。

text: I bought it last year for my daughter for Christmas when it was brand new and it wasn’t worth it then! However, they have added so many games now that it is totally worth it and she plays with it a ton she is five
text_zh: 我去年圣诞节女儿刚出的时候就给她买了，当时不值！但现在加了好多游戏，真的挺值的，她玩得可多了，她五岁

text: 10000000% worth it. A lot of games and they are always adding new games!!!!!
text_zh: 10000000%值得。有很多游戏，而且他们总是在添加新游戏!!!!!

text: Yes just bought it for my daughter who has autism and i spend time with her playing that it’s fun for both of us and limits her screen time
text_zh: 是的，我刚给我患有自闭症的女儿买了，我花时间陪她玩，这让她俩都觉得很有趣，还能限制她的屏幕时间

text: I want it too
text_zh: 我也想要

text: am looking for it it's sold out everywhere near me
text_zh: 我正在找，我这附近都卖光了

text: Got it for my daughters and SOOO worth it so far. You figure on other gaming systems you pay $60 for 1 game so the $90 a year for a ton of games and totally worth it.
text_zh: 给我女儿们买了，目前为止太值了。你想想其他游戏机要玩一个游戏就得花60美元，而一年90美元就能玩一大堆游戏，绝对值。

text: My grandkids love it!! Well worth it! Subscription is a great price for what you get. Best part they have to use their bodies to play = tired kids
text_zh: 我的孙子孙女们喜欢它！！非常值得！订阅也很划算，性价比很高。最棒的是他们得用身体来玩=累瘫的孩子们

text: I bought it for my 6 and 5 year old in October, before their fall break, they don’t live on it, but they play it often. Worth it. I enjoy playing on it with them as well. There’s so many games. Subscription is worth it also.
text_zh: 十月份给我的 6 岁和 5 岁的孩子买的，在他们秋假之前，他们不是一直玩，但玩得挺多的。挺值的。我也喜欢和他们一起玩。游戏太多了。订阅也值。

text: Yes we use it. Especially if they are busy or hyper. It will keep them preoccupied. My 5 year old and 9 year old both use it. We also use it with them.
text_zh: 是的，我们用。特别是他们忙或者很兴奋的时候。这个可以让他们保持专注。我5岁的和9岁的都在用。我们也会陪他们一起用。

text: yes!! my 8 year old and 16 year old both play it. Our whole family enjoys it. there is always new games and my 8 year old gets so excited. we got it when it first came out and they still play it regularly. I recommend it to everyone.
text_zh: 是的！！我8岁和16岁的孩子都玩。我们全家都喜欢。一直都有新游戏，我8岁的孩子超兴奋。我们刚出来的时候就买了，他们现在还在经常玩。我推荐给所有人。

text: My 5 year old daughter opened it last. Light and played with it for a good 2 hours straight! She’s already excited to try some more new games today!
text_zh: 我5岁的女儿上次打开玩了大概2个小时！她今天已经迫不及待想试更多新游戏了！
